---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-actions">
  <a class="btn-cv primary" href="DaniloFreireCV.pdf" download><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF</a>
  <a class="btn-cv ghost" href="DaniloFreireCV.pdf" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> View PDF in new tab</a>
  <span class="cv-updated">Last updated April 2026</span>
</div>

<div class="cv-contact">
  <div class="block">
    <h4>Contact</h4>
    <p>Department of Data and Decision Sciences</p>
    <p>Emory University</p>
    <p>36 Eagle Row, 4<sup>th</sup> Floor, Room 480</p>
    <p>Atlanta, GA 30322, USA</p>
  </div>
  <div class="block">
    <h4>Online</h4>
    <p><a href="mailto:danilo.freire@emory.edu">danilo.freire@emory.edu</a></p>
    <p><a href="https://danilofreire.github.io">danilofreire.github.io</a></p>
    <p><a href="https://github.com/danilofreire">github.com/danilofreire</a></p>
    <p><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lB1WKOYAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a> &middot; <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4712-6810">ORCID</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Academic appointments</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>Visiting Assistant Professor</b><span class="where">Department of Data and Decision Sciences, Emory University</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>Honorary Senior Fellow</b><span class="where">School of Social and Political Sciences, University of Lincoln</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021&ndash;2024</span><span class="what"><b>Senior Lecturer</b><span class="where">School of Social and Political Sciences, University of Lincoln</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2018&ndash;2020</span><span class="what"><b>Postdoctoral Research Associate</b><span class="where">Political Theory Project, Brown University</span></span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Education</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">PhD &middot; 2018</span><span class="what"><b>Political Economy</b><span class="where">King&rsquo;s College London</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">MA &middot; 2014</span><span class="what"><b>International Relations</b><span class="where">The Graduate Institute Geneva</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">MA &middot; 2011</span><span class="what"><b>Political Science</b><span class="where">University of S&atilde;o Paulo</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">BA &middot; 2007</span><span class="what"><b>Social Sciences</b><span class="where">University of S&atilde;o Paulo</span></span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Research interests</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Substantive</span><span class="what">Public Policy &middot; Political Violence &middot; Organised Crime &middot; Collective Action &middot; Brazilian Politics</span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Methods</span><span class="what">Computational Social Science &middot; Impact Evaluation &middot; Field Experiments &middot; Meta-Analysis</span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Publications</h2>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Peer-reviewed articles</div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2026</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-026-1234-5">Investigating the Analytical Robustness of the Social and Behavioural Sciences</a></div><div class="authors">With Bal&aacute;zs Acz&eacute;l, Barnab&aacute;s Sz&aacute;szi, Brian A. Nosek, and others</div><div class="venue">Nature, 652, 135&ndash;142.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2025</span><a href="https://royalsocietypublishing.org/doi/10.1098/rsos.241038">The Reliability of Replications: A Study in Computational Reproductions</a></div><div class="authors">With Nate Breznau, Eike Mark Rinke, Alexander Wuttke, and others</div><div class="venue">Royal Society Open Science, 12(3), 241038.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2025</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/ajps.12843">Legislature Size and Welfare: Evidence From Brazil</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti and Gabriel Cepaluni</div><div class="venue">American Journal of Political Science, 69(3), 831&ndash;846.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2023</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/20531680231155550">Vigilantism and Institutions: Attitudes toward Lynching in Brazil</a></div><div class="authors">With David Skarbek</div><div class="venue">Research &amp; Politics, 10(1), 1&ndash;8.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2021</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/S0007123420000579">The Effect of Legislature Size on Distributive Politics: A Meta-Analysis</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti, Catarina Roman, and Huzeyfe Alptekin</div><div class="venue">British Journal of Political Science.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2021</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/XPS.2020.24">Institutional Design and Elite Support for Climate Policies: Evidence from Latin American Countries</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti and David Skarbek</div><div class="venue">Journal of Experimental Political Science, Summer 2021, 172&ndash;184.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2020</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/2053168020919158">Bottom-Up Accountability and Public Service Provision: Evidence from a Field Experiment in Brazil</a></div><div class="authors">With Manoel Galdino and Umberto Mignozzetti</div><div class="venue">Research &amp; Politics, 7(2), 1&ndash;8.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2019</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.25222/larr.447">congressbr: An R Package for Analysing Data from Brazil&rsquo;s Chamber of Deputies and Federal Senate</a></div><div class="authors">With Robert McDonnell and Guilherme Duarte</div><div class="venue">Latin American Research Review, 54(4), 958&ndash;969.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2019</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/0094582X19835013">Beasts of Prey or Rational Animals? Private Governance in Brazil&rsquo;s Jogo do Bicho</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">Latin American Perspectives, 46(4), 230&ndash;244.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2018</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.25222/larr.334">Evaluating the Effect of Homicide Prevention Strategies in S&atilde;o Paulo, Brazil: A Synthetic Control Approach</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">Latin American Research Review, 53(2), 231&ndash;249.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2018</span><a href="https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.00361">prisonbrief: An R Package that Returns Tidy Data from the World Prison Brief Website</a></div><div class="authors">With Robert McDonnell</div><div class="venue">Journal of Open Source Software, 3(22), 361.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2015</span><a>Lack of Preferences, Political Trust and Education Levels: Alternative Explanations for Invalid Votes in Brazilian Elections</a></div><div class="authors">With Guilherme Arbache and Pietro Rodrigues</div><div class="venue">Encuentro Latinoamericano, 1(1), 29&ndash;50.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2014</span><a>Between Ballot Boxes and Guns: The Competitiveness of the Executive Branch and Civil Wars, 1976&ndash;2000</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">Revista Espa&ntilde;ola de Ciencia Pol&iacute;tica, 36, 33&ndash;60.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Working papers</div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a>Financial Incentives and Health Care Provision: Evidence from an Aedes aegypti Control Programme in Brazil</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti &middot; Under review</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a>Legislative Outcomes and Malapportionment: Evidence from Latin America</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti and Catarina Roman</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a>Democratising Policy Analytics with AutoML</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a>What Drives State-Sponsored Violence? Evidence from Extreme Bounds Analysis and Ensemble Learning Methods</a></div><div class="authors">With Gary Uzonyi</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title">Environmental Protection in Weak Party Systems: Evidence from Brazil</div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti &middot; In preparation</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title">Natural Disasters and Identity Reconstruction Among Syrian Refugees</div><div class="authors">With Hamoon Khelghat-Doost &middot; In preparation</div></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Book</div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2020</span><a>Natural Resources and Policy Choices in Latin America</a></div><div class="authors">Edited with Giovanna Fran&ccedil;a and Umberto Mignozzetti</div><div class="venue">S&atilde;o Paulo: Konrad Adenauer Foundation.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Book chapters</div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2017</span><a>Prison Gangs</a></div><div class="authors">With David Skarbek</div><div class="venue">In: Griffin &amp; Woodward (eds.). Handbook of Corrections in the United States. London: Routledge, 399&ndash;408.</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2010</span><a>A Nova Gest&atilde;o P&uacute;blica e a Qualidade da Democracia</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">In: Erkens (ed.). Nova Gest&atilde;o P&uacute;blica. S&atilde;o Paulo: Instituto Friedrich Naumann, 9&ndash;15.</div></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Other publications</div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2019</span><a>Geopolitics of Renewable Energies in Latin America: A Survey</a></div><div class="authors">With Umberto Mignozzetti</div><div class="venue">Policy Report, Konrad Adenauer Stiftung.</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2015</span><a>Peering at Open Peer Review</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">The Political Methodologist, 23(1), 6&ndash;11.</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2015</span><a>Book Review: Causal Inference, Shaolin-Style &mdash; &ldquo;Mastering Metrics&rdquo; by Angrist &amp; Pischke</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">Brazilian Political Science Review, 9(3), 178&ndash;185.</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2014</span><a>Entering the Underworld: Prison Gang Recruitment in S&atilde;o Paulo&rsquo;s Primeiro Comando da Capital</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">MA Thesis, The Graduate Institute Geneva.</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2013</span><a>Book Review: &ldquo;Why Nations Fail&rdquo; by Acemoglu &amp; Robinson</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">Meridiano47, 14(135).</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><span class="year-inline">2011</span><a>Entre Urnas e Armas: A Competitividade do Executivo e as Guerras Civis, 1976&ndash;2000</a></div><div class="authors">Danilo Freire</div><div class="venue">MA Thesis, University of S&atilde;o Paulo, 204p.</div></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Software</h2>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a href="https://danilofreire.github.io/pinochet">pinochet</a> &mdash; Data about the victims of the Pinochet regime, 1973&ndash;1990</div><div class="authors">With Lucas Mingardi and Robert McDonnell</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a href="https://github.com/RobertMyles/congressbr">congressbr</a> &mdash; Downloads and tidies legislative data from the Brazilian Federal Senate and Chamber of Deputies</div><div class="authors">With Robert McDonnell and Guilherme Duarte</div></div>
  <div class="cv-pub"><div class="title"><a href="https://danilofreire.github.io/prisonbrief">prisonbrief</a> &mdash; Returns tidy data from the World Prison Brief website</div><div class="authors">With Robert McDonnell</div></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Fellowships and awards</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024</span><span class="what"><b>Research Grant</b><span class="where">University of California, San Diego &middot; US$25,000 &middot; with Umberto Mignozzetti and Tereza Petrovicova</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2022&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>Associate Fellow (PR240832)</b><span class="where">Advance HE</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>EGAP Fellow</b><span class="where">Evidence in Governance and Politics</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2020</span><span class="what"><b>Research Grant</b><span class="where">King&rsquo;s College London &middot; US$10,000 &middot; with David Skarbek</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019</span><span class="what"><b>Research Grant</b><span class="where">Getulio Vargas Foundation &middot; US$64,000 &middot; with Mignozzetti &amp; Skarbek</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2018</span><span class="what"><b>Research Grant</b><span class="where">Konrad Adenauer Stiftung &middot; US$64,000 &middot; with Mignozzetti &amp; Skarbek</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2017&ndash;2019</span><span class="what"><b>Google Social Impact Challenge Grant</b><span class="where">US$300,000 &middot; with Galdino &amp; Mignozzetti</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2016&ndash;2018</span><span class="what"><b>Adam Smith Fellowship</b><span class="where">Mercatus Center, George Mason University &middot; US$10,000</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2016&ndash;2017</span><span class="what"><b>PhD Scholarship</b><span class="where">Institute for Humane Studies &middot; US$1,500</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2015&ndash;2018</span><span class="what"><b>Graduate School International Research Studentship</b><span class="where">King&rsquo;s College London &middot; US$58,000</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2015&ndash;2018</span><span class="what"><b>PhD Scholarship</b><span class="where">Brazilian Ministry of Education &middot; US$76,000</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2009&ndash;2011</span><span class="what"><b>MA Scholarship</b><span class="where">Brazilian Ministry of Education</span></span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Selected presentations &amp; invited talks</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021</span><span class="what"><b>Casting the First Stone: Attitudes Towards Lynchings in Brazil</b><span class="where">University of Washington; Oxford; Notre Dame; S&atilde;o Paulo Military Police Academy</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021</span><span class="what"><b>Democratising Policy Analytics with AutoML</b><span class="where">Society for Policy Analytics, Mercatus Center</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2020</span><span class="what"><b>Incentives in Health Care Prevention: Evidence from an Aedes aegypti Control Programme</b><span class="where">Global South Academic Network, University of Essex</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019&ndash;2020</span><span class="what"><b>Institutional Design and Elite Support for Climate Policies</b><span class="where">APSA, Washington DC; SPSA, San Juan</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019</span><span class="what"><b>Latin American Elites Favour Polycentric Governance in Climate Change Agreements</b><span class="where">MPSA, Chicago</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019</span><span class="what"><b>What Drives State-Sponsored Violence?</b><span class="where">Public Choice Society, Louisville</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2017</span><span class="what"><b>Three Ideas from the Vienna, Virginia, and Bloomington Schools of Political Economy</b><span class="where">Hayek Group Meeting, Friedrich Naumann Stiftung &amp; Prometheus, Berlin</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2017</span><span class="what"><b>Beasts of Prey or Rational Animals? Private Governance in Brazil&rsquo;s Jogo do Bicho</b><span class="where">VI Oxbridge Conference on Brazilian Studies, Cambridge</span></span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Teaching</h2>
  <div class="cv-subhead">Emory University</div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>DATASCI 385</b> &mdash; Experimental Methods <span class="detail">Undergraduate</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>DATASCI 350</b> &mdash; Data Science Computing <span class="detail">Undergraduate/Graduate</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2025&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>DATASCI 185</b> &mdash; Introduction to AI Applications <span class="detail">Undergraduate</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>DATASCI 151</b> &mdash; Introduction to Statistical Computing II <span class="detail">Undergraduate</span></span></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Workshops</div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024</span><span class="what"><b>EGAP Learning Days 15</b> &mdash; Field Experiments in the Social Sciences <span class="detail">Medell&iacute;n, with Aguilar, Bowers, Maldonado &amp; Seither</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2023</span><span class="what"><b>EGAP Learning Days 13</b> &mdash; Field Experiments in the Social Sciences <span class="detail">Mexico City, with Aguilar, Bowers, Maldonado &amp; Voors</span></span></div>

  <div class="cv-subhead">Previous</div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021&ndash;2024</span><span class="what"><b>Policing Crime and Deviance</b><span class="where">University of Lincoln, with Ellis &amp; Gaschino</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021&ndash;2024</span><span class="what"><b>Human Rights</b><span class="where">University of Lincoln, with Cowen &amp; Trantidis</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019</span><span class="what"><b>POLS 1824W</b> &mdash; Political Violence <span class="where">Brown University, Fall</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2019</span><span class="what"><b>POLS 1600</b> &mdash; Political Research Methods <span class="where">Brown University, Winter</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2017</span><span class="what"><b>Political Economy and Institutions</b><span class="where">OMMA &amp; Universidad Francisco Marroqu&iacute;n, Graduate</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2017</span><span class="what"><b>Principles of Economics I &amp; II</b><span class="where">King&rsquo;s College London, TA for D. Skarbek &amp; K. Matakos</span></span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Skills</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Software</span><span class="what">Python &middot; R &middot; Stata &middot; SPSS &middot; SQL &middot; git &middot; vimscript &middot; Quarto &middot; Markdown &middot; HTML &middot; LaTeX</span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Languages</span><span class="what">Portuguese (native) &middot; English (fluent) &middot; Spanish (fluent) &middot; French (intermediate)</span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Service</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2024&ndash;present</span><span class="what"><b>Associate Editor</b><span class="where">International Social Science Journal</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2021&ndash;2026</span><span class="what"><b>Associate Editor</b><span class="where">Humanities &amp; Social Sciences Communications</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">2012&ndash;2016</span><span class="what"><b>Co-editor</b><span class="where">Leviathan, University of S&atilde;o Paulo</span></span></div>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Referee</span><span class="what">American Journal of Political Science &middot; Civil Wars &middot; Electoral Studies &middot; Frontiers in Sociology &middot; Journal of Latin American Studies &middot; Journal of Peace Research &middot; Journal of Public Economics &middot; Latin American Research Review &middot; Leviathan &middot; Oxford Economic Papers &middot; Political Behavior &middot; Political Studies Review &middot; Politikon &middot; Princeton University Press &middot; Revista Espa&ntilde;ola de Ciencia Pol&iacute;tica &middot; SAGE Open &middot; The Social Science Journal &middot; Swiss Political Science Review</span></div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
  <h2>Memberships</h2>
  <div class="cv-row"><span class="when">Professional</span><span class="what">American Economic Association &middot; American Political Science Association &middot; Evidence in Governance and Politics &middot; Global South Academic Network &middot; Society for Policy Analytics &middot; Society for Political Methodology</span></div>
</div>
```
